brief_html: Updated C>S 0x05 SID_CLIENTID, sends client identification numbers.
format:
(UINT32) Server Version

For server version 1:
    (UINT32) Registration Version
    (UINT32) Registration Authority

For server version 0:
    (UINT32) Registration Authority
    (UINT32) Registration Version

(UINT32) Account Number
(UINT32) Registration Token
(STRING) LAN computer name
(STRING) LAN username
remarks_html:
Updated C>S 0x05 SID_CLIENTID, sends client identification numbers.

See that page for more information.

The server will reply with SID_CLIENTID.
